chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-489 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 1940/24 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 1941/24 4.For hearing of main case 02-05-2024 Petitioner present in person. ***** 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. We have heard petitioner in person. He is seeking directions for enquiry against alleged mega corruption by respondent No.12. However, he has not filed any proof or any material showing that any of the allegations leveled by him has some substance. Instead, he has filed a number of applications he has been moving to various authorities against the respondents, which shows that he is a habitual in making applications against officials. In view of above, no case is made out. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
